objective: Add a bundle-level coverage score alongside (not replacing) per-source quality scoring: continuous temporal sequence, angle span, lighting consistency, macro coverage, independent source count, exact-variant confidence, interference diversity. A weak source must not pass because the bundle is diverse; a coherent multi-angle bundle must not be rejected solely because each frame is a single view.
current_state: reference_bundle.py tiers bundles from per-source tiers only; three well-registered angles of one card scored 0.499 each (single-angle penalty) and the bundle stayed C although cross-source angle diversity was real. Provenance rule: sources whose review notes mark seller attribution UNKNOWN count as ONE independent-source family.
assumptions: The frozen reference-source-quality schema is not edited; the coverage record is a NEW JSON artifact under the bundle review/ directory with its own documented structure (schema formalization can follow later).
Independent source count must derive from seller/listing attribution AND explicit provenance-unknown flags in review notes, never from source_id count alone.
acceptance_criteria: compute_bundle_coverage produces a documented coverage record (the seven axes, each 0-1, plus a composite and per-axis rationale strings) written by a new optcg-reference coverage CLI verb.

Bundle tier logic incorporates coverage WITHOUT weakening per-source gates: tier B eligibility may now be satisfied by (a) existing per-source route OR (b) >=3 accepted-registration sources spanning >=3 distinct angles with variant confidence >=0.9 AND coverage composite over a documented floor — while any source below per-source floors still contributes nothing individually.
Provenance-unknown families collapse to one independent source (unit test).

A weak-source-in-diverse-bundle test proves individual sources are not upgraded by coverage; a coherent-multi-angle test proves the 0.499 scenario now reaches reviewed-B eligibility (human review still required for B).
required_tests: uv run ruff check src tests
stop_conditions: The rule cannot be expressed without editing the frozen schema (report; do not edit it).
expected_outputs: compute_bundle_coverage + coverage CLI verb + tier integration
Unit tests incl. provenance-collapse and no-weak-source-promotion
